trigger: git/npm/curl fails with 'could not resolve host'
guidance: It's DNS, not the tool. Suspect VPN first (NordVPN ThreatProtection/kill-switch mangles DNS even when disconnected). Isolate with: ping 1.1.1.1 (raw IP) vs nslookup github.com. Both fail = outage/router; only nslookup fails = DNS.

trigger: a local checkout has diverged from origin with throwaway local edits
guidance: Don't fight a merge. Back up local state to a branch (or stash -u), then 'git reset --hard origin/main'. Confirm with the user before discarding tracked work.

trigger: before installing a big third-party agent framework (e.g. ECC) into an existing setup
guidance: Clone read-only and cherry-pick. Don't bulk-install — it fights existing CLAUDE.md/hooks and bloats context. Port the few mechanisms that beat what you have.
